rulings.Case Title: MATTIE MCFALL et al VS. ARVIN MERITOR, INC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Bentley Motors, Inc., Mercedes-Benz Usa Llc, Volkswagen Group Of America, Inc.¿S Motion For Order Compelling Marcel Mcfall And Michael Mcfall To Provide A Further Response To Document Requests And Produce All Responsive Materials And Things
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, June 29, 2011, line 1. Defendants Bentley Motors, Inc., Mercedes-Benz USA LLC, Volkswagen Group of America, Inc.¿s motion will be heard at 9:30am in Dept. 503, Hon. Teri L. Jackson presiding. Defendants¿ motion for order compelling Marcel McFall and Michael McFall to provide a further response to document requests and produce all responsive materials and things is granted in part and off calendar in part. It is granted as to requests 1, 2, 4, 23-27, 37-39, 45, 46. No opposition filed. It is off calendar as to requests 3, 5, 34, 35, 47, 48, as defendants have withdrawn the motion as to those requests. Defendants¿ request for sanctions is granted in the amount of $2872.00 against plaintiffs¿ counsel. No opposition filed. = (503/TLJ)
